ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error: Malformed JSON in actions field. Please check your chain button syntax.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No active file found for templater processing.
ast.target: 未找到用于模板处理的活跃文件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Templater is not installed. Please install it.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error setting up templater functions. Check console for details.
ast.target: 设置模板函数时出错。请查看控制台了解详情。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: There was an error processing the template!

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: There was an issue prepending content, please try again
ast.target: 前置内容时出现问题，请重试

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: There was an issue appending content, please try again
ast.target: 追加内容时出现问题，请重试

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: There was an issue parsing the line number, please try again
ast.target: 解析行号时出现问题，请重试

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: There was an issue inserting content at cursor, please try again
ast.target: 在光标处插入内容时出现问题，请重试

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: There was an error! Maybe the file already exists?
ast.target: 发生错误！可能文件已存在？

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Check the line number in your calculate button
ast.target: 请检查计算按钮中的行号

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: You need to have the Templates or Templater plugin enabled and Template folder defined
ast.target: 您需要启用Templates或Templater插件并定义模板文件夹

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: templater args don't work with inline buttons yet
ast.target: 内联按钮暂不支持模板参数

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No actions array found for chain button.
ast.target: 未找到链式按钮的操作数组。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error processing templater in chain action. Check console for details.
ast.target: 在链式操作中处理模板时出错。请查看控制台了解详情。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No active file found. Buttons can only be used with files.
ast.target: 未找到活跃文件。按钮只能与文件一起使用。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error processing templater in button. Check console for details.
ast.target: 在按钮中处理模板时出错。请查看控制台了解详情。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: swap args only work in inline buttons for now
ast.target: 交换参数目前仅适用于内联按钮

ast.source: Link - Open a URL or URI

ast.name: text

ast.target: 文本 - 插入或创建带有文本的笔记

ast.target: 计算 - 执行数学计算

ast.name: text

ast.target: 交换 - 从其他按钮创建多用途内联按钮

ast.name: text
ast.target: 复制 - 将文本复制到剪贴板

ast.name: text
ast.source: Chain - Run multiple actions in sequence
ast.target: 链式 - 按顺序执行多个操作

ast.name: text
ast.source: Remove this button (or other buttons) after clicking?
ast.target: 点击后是否移除此按钮（或其他按钮）？

ast.source: Replace lines in the note after clicking?
ast.target: 点击后是否替换笔记中的行？

ast.source: Inherit args by adding an existing button block-id?
ast.target: 通过添加现有按钮块ID来继承参数？

ast.name: text
ast.source: Convert templater commands inside your button on each click?
ast.target: 每次点击时转换按钮内的Templater命令？

ast.source: Add a custom class for button styling
ast.target: 添加用于按钮样式的自定义类

ast.name: text
ast.source: What color would you like your button to be?
ast.target: 您希望按钮使用什么颜色？

ast.name: text
ast.source: Add actions to be executed in sequence
ast.target: 添加要按顺序执行的操作

ast.name: text
ast.source: Select a template note and what should happen
ast.target: 选择模板笔记及操作方式

ast.name: text
ast.source: Enter a calculation, you can reference a line number with $LineNumber
ast.target: 输入计算表达式，可使用 $LineNumber 引用行号

ast.name: text
ast.source: Choose buttons to be included in the Inline Swap Button
ast.target: 选择要包含在内联交换按钮中的按钮

ast.name: text
ast.target: 要复制到剪贴板的文本

ast.name: text
ast.source: Use true to remove this button, or supply an [array] of button block-ids
ast.target: 使用 true 移除该按钮，或提供按钮块 ID 的 [数组]

ast.name: text
ast.source: Supply an array of [startingLine, endingLine] to be replaced
ast.target: 提供 [起始行, 结束行] 数组以替换

ast.name: text
ast.source: Inherit from other buttons by adding their button block-id
ast.target: 通过添加其他按钮的块 ID 来继承其设置

ast.name: text
ast.source: At which line should the content be inserted?

ast.name: text
ast.source: Should you be prompted to enter a name for the file on creation?
ast.target: 创建时是否提示输入文件名？

ast.name: text
ast.source: What should the new note be named? Note: if prompt is on, this will be the default name
ast.target: 新笔记应如何命名？注意：若启用提示，此名称将作为默认名称

ast.name: text
ast.source: How should the new note be opened?

ast.name: text
ast.source: Enter a folder path to place the note in. Defaults to root
ast.target: 输入文件夹路径以放置笔记。默认为根目录
